scientific_scope: comparator development on burned calibration tapes only

resource_interpretation.frozen_model_rule: Every policy receives exactly one mutually exclusive M/T/R team-week per epoch and identical initial reserve stock, capacity, target, lead, production and access to Op9 inventory.
resource_interpretation.domain_hold: Whether reserve replenishment consumes a separate finite transport, handling, fuel, order-processing or shared M/T/R resource remains a Garrido face-validation question.

interpretation: The unique best calendar uses all three permitted switches, so the frozen family is boundary-active. This does not establish adaptive value and does not establish a family null. It requires a separately frozen richer comparator gate before any observable-policy or learner claim.

next_gate.family: complete calendars with at most four switches under the same calibration-only semantics
next_gate.execution_target: ovh-agent-lab VPS after a six-tape concurrent six-worker observed-RSS preflight
next_gate.watcher_requirement: independent detached watcher must attest prestart before scientific PID
next_gate.stop_rule: If the unique selected calendar is interior, do not infer global optimality; if it again uses the maximum switch count, do not claim H_obs and reconsider the next certified comparator step before further expansion.

vps_audit.warning: The current exact W24 transducer is estimated to require more than 33 GiB before Python overhead and must not be launched on the 10-GiB VPS without disk-backed state storage or a measured sub-6-GiB one-tape profile.
